title: stemmacantha heleniifolia subsp. bicknellii
intro: Stemmacantha heleniifolia subsp. bicknellii, also known as Bicknell's thistle, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tea, or applied topically as a poultice to treat various health conditions.
